name: solana-coralos
description: PatchBond — CoralOS agents compete to repair code; Solana devnet escrow pays only for verified outcomes.

scripts.setup: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix scripts --no-audit --no-fund && node scripts/setup.js
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:agents && npm run build -w @patchbond/demo
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @patchbond/core && npm run build -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.build:agents: npm run build -w buyer-agent && npm run build -w seller-agent && npm run build -w verifier-agent
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:examples && npm run typecheck:agents
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck -w @patchbond/core && npm run typecheck -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.typecheck:examples: npm run typecheck -w @patchbond/demo && npm run typecheck -w @pay/example-txodds && npm run typecheck -w txodds-feed
scripts.typecheck:agents: npm run typecheck -w buyer-agent && npm run typecheck -w seller-agent && npm run typecheck -w verifier-agent
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run test:examples && npm run test:agents
scripts.test:packages: npm test -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm test -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm test -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm test -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.test:agents: npm test -w buyer-agent && npm test -w seller-agent && npm test -w verifier-agent
scripts.demo:patchbond: npm run build -w @patchbond/core && npm run build -w @patchbond/demo && npm run demo -w @patchbond/demo
scripts.platform:patchbond: npm run build -w @patchbond/core && npm run build -w @patchbond/demo && npm run platform -w @patchbond/demo
scripts.demo:patchbond:coral: npm run build -w @patchbond/core && npm run build:agents && npm run build -w @patchbond/demo && npm run coral -w @patchbond/demo
